mapper.select: select mi.id as itemId, pr.id as prescriptionId, pr.name as prescriptionName, d.name as drugName, d.price as unitPrice, mi.num as num, mi.frequency as frequency, mi.medical_advice as medicalAdvice, st.name as orderDoctorName, mi.current_num as currentNum, COALESCE(mi.refund_num, 0) as refundNum, mi.status as itemStatus from dms_medicine_prescription_record pr inner join dms_medicine_item_record mi on mi.prescription_id = pr.id inner join dms_drug d on d.id = mi.drug_id left join sms_staff st on st.id = pr.create_staff_id where pr.registration_id = #{registrationId} and (pr.status is null or pr.status <> 2) and (pr.refund_status is null or pr.refund_status = 0) order by pr.id asc, mi.id asc
